top_insights: The economy rewards those who sell certainty to the insecure.
Formal education teaches you to follow rules; self-teaching teaches you to break them.
Nobody is coming to save you, and that is your greatest advantage.
True leverage comes from ignoring the noise everyone else is consuming.
The smartest people in the room are usually the ones who stayed quiet.
hook_patterns: Contrarian statements that challenge popular consensus or norms
Insight-driven reveals using 'I used to...' or 'Turns out...' to signal exclusive knowledge
Short, punchy declarative sentences that offer a definitive rule or hard truth
angles: Expose the 'unspoken rules' of high-status environments or industries
Deconstruct common societal myths with a 'hard truth' perspective
Frame personal habits or life resets as strategic advantages for success
emotional_drivers: Validation of the audience's skepticism or hidden frustrations
Desire for status and leverage through access to 'insider' information
Relief from the pressure of needing to have an opinion on everything
emerging_narrative: A shift toward radical self-reliance and skepticism of established institutions, where success is framed as a result of individual agency, self-education, and seeing through the 'illusion' of the economy and media narratives.

viral_examples.author: Codie_Sanchez
viral_examples.text: I have a friend who used to work for 2 billionaires after all he's seen he said to me, "I wish you not one penny over $299 million. Reality gets completely lost somewhere after that." I think about that sometimes.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Elon’s stance is principled. Trump’s stance is practical. Tech needs Republicans for the present. Republicans need Tech for the future. Drop the tax cuts, cut some pork, get the bill through.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: The smartest people are all self-taught, even if they went to school.

viral_examples.author: ShaanVP
viral_examples.text: Turns out the greatest startup idea of the last 10 years was a chatbot where you ask a question and it answers with something a guy wrote on Reddit 8 years ago unusual_whales @unusual_whales Oct 7, 2025 ChatGPT has hit 800 million weekly active users.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Panic led to lockdowns. Lockdowns led to fiscal stimulus. Stimulus led to inflation. Inflation led to monetary tightening. Tightening leads to recession. The panic wasn’t free - and the bill is coming due.

winning_patterns: Contrarian statements that challenge popular consensus or norms
Insight-driven reveals using 'I used to...' or 'Turns out...' to signal exclusive knowledge
Short, punchy declarative sentences that offer a definitive rule or hard truth
avoid_recent_hooks: The real problem isn't that you're unmotivated.
The real problem isn't that you're poor.
If you understand this, you win:
Stop believing that motivation is the prerequisite for action.
The real problem isn't that you lack a unique idea.
